2016-07-26.title: 9-Year-Old Child Worker Dies in Bangladeshi Textile Mill
2016-07-26.abstract: The father of Sagar Barman accused the supervisors at Zobeda Textile Mill in Dhaka of killing his son by pumping air into his rectum.

2016-07-26.abstract: The birth is probably the first case of its kind in Europe, according to the hospital in Barcelona where the infant was born.

2016-07-27.abstract: A small number of people with strong personal grievances appear to be mining previous rampages for methods and potential targets to plan their own attacks.

2016-07-28.abstract: “Collected Works,” a set of speeches and writings by Zhao Ziyang from the 1980s, offers a glimpse into a period when he helped steer China’s economic overhauls.
